'''doyaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oidiomycotic|oidiomycotic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oidiomycotic|oidiomycotic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doyaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyarithi|doyarithi]] || [[word:doyariji|doyariji]] || [[word:doyarishi|doyarishi]] || [[word:doyariki|doyariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyaruthuthu|doyaruthuthu]] || [[word:doyarujuju|doyarujuju]] || [[word:doyarushushu|doyarushushu]] || [[word:doyarukuku|doyarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyaruthu|doyaruthu]] || [[word:doyaruju|doyaruju]] || [[word:doyarushu|doyarushu]] || [[word:doyaruku|doyaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyarufthuf|doyarufthuf]] || [[word:doyarufjuf|doyarufjuf]] || [[word:doyarufshuf|doyarufshuf]] || [[word:doyarufkuf|doyarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyarethe|doyarethe]] || [[word:doyareje|doyareje]] || [[word:doyareshe|doyareshe]] || [[word:doyareke|doyareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyarothotho|doyarothotho]] || [[word:doyarojojo|doyarojojo]] || [[word:doyaroshosho|doyaroshosho]] || [[word:doyarokoko|doyarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyarotho|doyarotho]] || [[word:doyarojo|doyarojo]] || [[word:doyarosho|doyarosho]] || [[word:doyaroko|doyaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyarofthof|doyarofthof]] || [[word:doyarofjof|doyarofjof]] || [[word:doyarofshof|doyarofshof]] || [[word:doyarofkof|doyarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfthĂŻf|doyarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfjĂŻf|doyarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfshĂŻf|doyarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfkĂŻf|doyarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|doyarĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|doyarĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|doyarĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|doyarĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfthĂŻf|doyarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfjĂŻf|doyarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfshĂŻf|doyarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfkĂŻf|doyarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfthĂŻf|doyarĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfjĂŻf|doyarĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfshĂŻf|doyarĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doyarĂŻfkĂŻf|doyarĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:doyarĂŠthĂŠ|doyarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:doyarĂŠjĂŠ|doyarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:doyarĂŠshĂŠ|doyarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:doyarĂŠkĂŠ|doyarĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:doyarathatha|doyarathatha]] || [[word:doyarajaja|doyarajaja]] || [[word:doyarashasha|doyarashasha]] || [[word:doyarakaka|doyarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:doyaratha|doyaratha]] || [[word:doyaraja|doyaraja]] || [[word:doyarasha|doyarasha]] || [[word:doyaraka|doyaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:doyarafthaf|doyarafthaf]] || [[word:doyarafjaf|doyarafjaf]] || [[word:doyarafshaf|doyarafshaf]] || [[word:doyarafkaf|doyarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:doyarasha|doyarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyarshĂ«sha|doyarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyarosha|doyarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyarmusha|doyarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyaryasha|doyaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyarnkshĂ«sha|godoyarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyarnkrosha|godoyarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyarnkmusha|godoyarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyarnkyasha|godoyarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:doyayarasha|doyayarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyayarshĂ«sha|doyayarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyayarosha|doyayarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyayarmusha|doyayarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyayaryasha|doyayaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyayarnkshĂ«sha|godoyayarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyayarnkrosha|godoyayarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyayarnkmusha|godoyayarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyayarnkyasha|godoyayarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:deyĂŠrasha|deyĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:deyĂŠrshĂ«sha|deyĂŠrshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:deyĂŠrosha|deyĂŠrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:deyĂŠrmusha|deyĂŠrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:deyĂŠryasha|deyĂŠryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godeyĂŠrnkshĂ«sha|godeyĂŠrnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godeyĂŠrnkrosha|godeyĂŠrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godeyĂŠrnkmusha|godeyĂŠrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godeyĂŠrnkyasha|godeyĂŠrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:doyfarasha|doyfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doyfarshĂ«sha|doyfarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doyfarosha|doyfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doyfarmusha|doyfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doyfaryasha|doyfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoyfarnkshĂ«sha|godoyfarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoyfarnkrosha|godoyfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoyfarnkmusha|godoyfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoyfarnkyasha|godoyfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
